name: dotfiles-agent
description: Trusted workstation agent surface for local shell automation, configuration governance, and fleet management.

skills.name: Bounded Agent Modes
skills.description: Operate within ask/plan/apply/audit execution profiles with RBAC.

skills.name: MCP Governance
skills.description: Validate MCP configuration, policy, supply chain, and registry.

skills.name: Replayable Checkpoints
skills.description: Save and replay bounded agent execution checkpoints.

skills.name: Fleet Attestation Export
skills.description: Export fleet-wide attestation and drift evidence.

authentication.description: Local CLI tool — no network authentication required.

signing.description: Signed commits and configuration governance via SSH ED25519 keys.
